trans-unit.source: Thank you for installing the latest version!
trans-unit.target: Thank you for installing the latest version!
trans-unit.note: Standard text in a composer block

trans-unit.source: You’re using the latest version of Mozilla VPN. We’ve made bug fixes, UI adjustments and other performance improvements to make your experience using VPN even better.
trans-unit.target: You’re using the latest version of Mozilla VPN. We’ve made bug fixes, UI adjustments and other performance improvements to make your experience using VPN even better.
